newsSinceJun6: No material news since June 6, 2026. Only fresh item is a minor new NEV-parts subsidiary in Chongqing (RMB 50M registered capital) registered in June - operationally immaterial. Key thesis drivers all predate the window: domestic-first reverse planetary roller screw launched March 2026, second HK IPO prospectus filed March 26, 2026 (CSRC filing notice received), and humanoid-robot linear-joint module sampling/small-batch delivery to two leading domestic NEV OEMs still without formal design-win (dingdian) confirmation. Today's -0.75% move is noise.

sources.label: Futubull - Shuanglin (300100) screw-grinding integrated layout note
Eastmoney - Shuanglin launches domestic-first reverse planetary roller screw
Sina Finance - Shuanglin pivots to HK IPO after terminating A-share placement

verdicts.rankRationale: On the robotics body-stack lens nothing changed since yesterday's hold: roller-screw sampling to two NEV OEMs continues without a formal design win, and the -19.6% YTD de-rating already in the score keeps the asymmetry attractive but unconfirmed. Flat tape (-0.75% today) plus no new evidence means the setup is identical; small +1 drift for thesis-intact de-crowding, not a re-rank.
verdicts.bull: First domestic reverse planetary roller screw with in-house thread grinding positions Shuanglin as a body-stack bottleneck candidate; any formal dingdian from Tesla-chain or domestic humanoid OEMs re-rates a $2.7B cap sharply, and the post-pullback entry is under-owned.
verdicts.neutral: Auto-parts core (reducers, interior components) funds the screw optionality while sampling drags on; HK IPO adds capital for screw capacity but also dilution, leaving the stock range-bound until a confirmed order.
verdicts.bear: Screw business is still pre-revenue at scale with no model confirmation; humanoid actuator architectures could shift to designs favoring competitors (Best Precision, Hengli), and the HK listing at a depressed price crystallizes dilution without a catalyst.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Formal design-win / fixed-point confirmation of planetary roller screws or linear joint modules from a humanoid robot OEM, or HK IPO pricing that funds screw capacity.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Sampling-to-order conversion failure plus HK IPO dilution overhang while the legacy auto-parts business carries the valuation.
